Hello today I saw the protests of Turkish players and I felt really bad for them GTA 6 doesnt support their native language yet they are so excited and havent lost hope they are actively using hashtags and messaging Rockstar to get Turkish language support added to the game Please empathize with the sense of incompleteness that comes from not being able to play a game in your native language and please be a supporter of them
